shows.title: The Art of Love
shows.overview: A cross-cultural romance between a Korean man and a Japanese woman, exploring the universal language of love through miscommunication and heartwarming moments.

shows.title: The Embracing Empress
shows.overview: A Joseon-era noblewoman time-slips to modern-day Seoul, causing hilarious culture clashes while finding unexpected love.

shows.title: Lovely Runner
shows.overview: A devoted fan travels back in time to save her idol from a tragic fate, discovering love along the way.

shows.title: Friendly Rivalry
shows.overview: Two opposite-personality female lawyers team up to take on cases, building an unlikely friendship through competition.

shows.title: Queen of Tears
shows.overview: A chaebol heiress and her husband navigate marital crisis, proving love can survive even the most dramatic circumstances.

shows.title: The Glory
shows.overview: A bullying victim meticulously plans her revenge against her childhood tormentors, years after the trauma.

shows.title: Moving
shows.overview: Superpowered parents hide their abilities to protect their children, but the next generation must confront a dangerous threat.

shows.title: Extraordinary Attorney Woo
shows.overview: A brilliant young lawyer with autism spectrum disorder navigates the courtroom and her personal life with unique perspective.

shows.title: Hometown Cha-Cha-Cha
shows.overview: A city dentist moves to a seaside village and meets a charming jack-of-all-trades, sparking a healing romance.

shows.title: Boyfriend on Demand
shows.overview: A K-pop idol navigates the chaotic world of contract relationships in this sweet and funny rom-com.

shows.title: Love Next Door
shows.overview: Childhood neighbors reunite as adults, rekindling their bond into a sweet second-chance romance.

shows.title: Twinkling Watermelon
shows.overview: A musically gifted teenager time-travels to 1995, discovering his parents' youth and the power of music.

shows.title: The Glory Part 2
shows.overview: The revenge reaches its climax as the victim confronts her tormentors in this gripping finale.

shows.title: Black Flame Dragon
shows.overview: A female gaming streamer and a mysterious top player develop an unexpected romance in the esports world.

shows.title: My Perfect Secretary
shows.overview: A cold-hearted CEO and her seemingly perfect secretary discover there's more to each other than meets the eye.

shows.title: Cinderella at 2AM
shows.overview: A chaebol heiress goes incognito and falls for an ordinary man in this modern Cinderella story.

shows.title: Doctor Slump
shows.overview: Two former rivals, both burnt-out doctors, find healing and love when they hit rock bottom together.

shows.title: Reborn Rich
shows.overview: A loyal employee is reborn as the youngest son of the chaebol family that betrayed him, seeking justice.

shows.title: Signal
shows.overview: A profiler communicates with a detective from the past through a mysterious walkie-talkie to solve cold cases.

shows.title: Reply 1988
shows.overview: Five families in a Seoul neighborhood share laughter, tears, and the unforgettable warmth of the late 1980s.
